perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a checkered flat cap and glasses sits in the driver's seat of a car, holding an iPhone and speaking toward someone off-camera. (2) He maneuvers the iPhone to show the screen, displaying the Apple Wallet app with a Suica card interface; he proceeds to input a top-up amount of 5000 Yen while gesturing at the screen. (3) The phone displays a payment processing animation, after which the man holds the phone up to show a completed transaction checkmark.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice off-camera asks a question in a curious tone. A male voice responds enthusiastically, talking about the current low exchange rate of the Japanese Yen. (2) The male voice narrates his actions step-by-step as he uses his phone to top up a travel card, accompanied by faint street noise and the sound of finger taps on glass. (3) The man exclaims 'Success!' as the transaction completes, ending with a satisfied tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "老闆你在衝沙毀" (What are you doing, boss?) - Curious tone. (2) Functional Text: "我跟你講... 超酷的... 現在日幣呢 0.209" (I'm telling you... so cool... now the Yen is 0.209) - Informative and excited tone. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: "太及時了吧" (So timely!) - Surprised tone. (4) Functional Text: "正在處理付款... 成功！" (Processing payment... Success!) - Triumphant tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Explanation of Opportunity -> Practical Tech Demonstration -> Result

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator visible in the driver's seat; 1 female voice audible but not visible.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a black and white houndstooth flat cap, clear-framed glasses, and a white t-shirt with black graphic text. He has a wooden bead bracelet on his right wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a vehicle with leather seats and a sunroof; through the window, a city street with a shop sign featuring the character '武' and a phone number is visible.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a practical financial and travel tip for viewers, demonstrating the ease of reloading a digital Suica card via an iPhone's Apple Wallet. By capitalizing on a favorable exchange rate for the Japanese Yen (0.209), the creator provides a real-time example of how technology can be used to manage travel expenses efficiently, presenting the process as both simple and rewarding for tourists.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Personal tech tip vlog style without explicit promotional language for a third-party brand.

social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video captures a spontaneous moment of sharing a useful travel/finance hack, common in influencer-led lifestyle content.
